prestazioni: Engine: Radical-tuned Ford EcoBoost 2.3L *GTD-230* (direct-injection, closed-deck block) with billet crankshaft, forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 CR), and Carrillo H-beam rods. Turbocharged with a Garrett GTX4202R Gen II (84mm compressor, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) running 32psi of boost on E85 fuel, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valve.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB LSD (80% lock) with Radical-spec 6-speed sequential gearbox (dog-ring engagement, 1.5kg lighter carbon-fiber shift forks) and a Tilton triple-plate ceramic clutch (800Nm torque capacity). Custom 3.73:1 final drive ratio for 0-60mph in 2.8s.

Suspension & Aero: Öhlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers (20mm adjustable ride height, 24-position rebound/compression damping) with Radical-specific anti-roll bars (24mm front, 22mm rear). Full carbon-fiber aero package by Radical Performance (front splitter with 150kg downforce at 100mph, rear diffuser with Gurney flap, and a fixed rear wing generating 220kg downforce at 120mph).
estetica: Body: Radical Rapture-specific carbon-fiber widebody kit (2.5-inch wider front fenders, 3-inch wider rear quarters) with integrated cooling ducts for the GTX4202R turbo. Full carbon-fiber hood with NACA ducts feeding the intercooler and a removable roof panel for open-cockpit track days.

Interior: Sparco Pro 2000 carbon-fiber racing seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified) with 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses. Custom Radical-branded Alcantara-wrapped steering wheel (320mm diameter) with integrated AIM MXS Strada dash display (12 data channels, lap timing, and boost pressure logging).

Lighting & Details: OEM-replaced front LED headlights with Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs (150% brighter) and custom carbon-fiber side mirrors by APR Performance. Rear end features a Radical-exclusive titanium exhaust system (dual 3.5-inch outlets, Inconel 625 headers) with a carbon-fiber diffuser insert for heat dissipation.
